title: Billionaire Investor Says 'Sell Real Estate'

title: AvalonBay Vs. Essex Property: What's The Best REIT To Buy Today?
text: It is arguably the best time since 2008 to buy apartment REITs. AvalonBay Communities and Essex Property Trust are both heavily discounted.

title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Declares Second Quarter 2023 Dividends
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a cash dividend on the Company's Common Stock (par value $0.01 per share) for the second quarter of 2023. The Common Stock dividend is $1.65 per share and is payable July 17, 2023, to all Common Stockholders of Record as of June 30, 2023. About AvalonBay Communities, Inc. As of March 31, 2023, the Company owned or held a direct or indirect ownership interest in 295 apart.

title: Buy REITs When There's Blood In The Streets

title: 3 Housing Stocks That Are Resilient to Home Price Fluctuations
text: Most housing stocks could come under pressure this year. After all, persistently high mortgage rates and home prices, coupled with concerns around inflation, bank sector chaos, weakening economic growth, and a very real possibility of recession have kept a lot of potential homebuyers on the fence.

title: Inflation Cools, But Nobody Believes It
text: U.S. equity markets finished lower for a second-straight week as data showing an encouraging cooldown of inflationary pressures was offset by ongoing regional bank instability and an unresolved debt ceiling standoff. Declining for a second week after ending April at its highest levels of the year, the S&P 500 slipped 0.3% on the week, but the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 gained nearly 1%.

title: Why I Stopped Buying REITs To Buy Rental Properties Instead
text: REITs are better investments than rental properties in most cases. But there are exceptions.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain AvalonBay (AVB) Stock for Now
text: Healthy demand for residential properties, strategic buyouts and technological innovations bode well for AvalonBay (AVB). However, the lack of rent relief and interest rate hikes are worrisome.

title: Likely No Alpha For AvalonBay Communities
text: AvalonBay is a residential REIT with exposure to legacy markets on both coasts. Strong YoY performance, but growth is expected to slow materially going forward.

title: Winners Of REIT Earnings Season
text: You wouldn't know it by reading the mainstream financial press, but there's more to commercial real estate than office buildings. Obscured by office pain, REITs delivered surprisingly strong first quarter results. Of the 83 equity REITs that provide full-year Funds from Operations ("FFO") guidance, 37 (44%) raised their full-year earnings outlook, while 5 (6%) lowered guidance.

title: Rental Properties Vs. Residential REITs: Which Is Better?
text: Rentals have much more leverage earlier on, which means beginners can earn higher returns. REITs have lower variance of returns due to diversification and lower leverage. They also have better economies of scale, which results in better operating margin.

title: 10 REITs For The Long Haul
text: No junk. No terrible REITs with excess leverage hoping to support a fat yield. These REITs compound wealth for investors over the long haul.

title: Stocks to Buy: 7 Earnings Winners to Load Up on in May
text: While the meat of the financial disclosure season didn't quite get off to an auspicious start, a few notable enterprises produced strong results, making them earnings winners stocks. Facing tough headwinds such as geopolitical dynamics, monetary policy concerns, and an economy that could still suffer a recession, investors should at least consider adding proven winners to their portfolios.
